title: Business ownership and sources of finance
summary: 9609 AS — how ownership form affects access to finance.
learningObjectives: Link ownership types to finance options.
Compare sole trader, partnership, company funding.
Explain equity vs debt at intro level.

simpleExplanation.title: Structure shapes funding
simpleExplanation.summary: Sole traders rely on personal funds; companies can issue shares and borrow more formally.

sections.content: **Ownership and finance** (5.2.1) connects **1.2.2 business ownership** to **5.2.2 sources**.
